question: Should I contact the seller if tracking is missing?
chunk title: Orders Sold and Fulfilled by Third-Party Sellers
correct_chunk:
Seller orders can also be tracked, but only if the seller has shared this information with Amazon and you've chosen a traceable shipping method.
If a Track package option is not available, contact the seller as follows:
1. Go to Your Orders.
2. Find your order in the list.
3. Select Problem with Order.
4. Choose your topic from list displayed.
5. Select Contact Seller.
Allow two days for the seller to respond. In most cases you'll receive a reply sooner.
answer: Yes, for third-party seller orders, contact the seller through Your Orders.

question: What are the delivery terms and options for bahamas click2clear
doc title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
chunk title: Customs Identification in Argentina, Bahamas, Cayman Islands, and Thailand
correct_chunk:
- Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared.
- The Bahamas: Customers in The Bahamas must register with the Click2Clear portal to clear shipments at Bahamas customs with a valid photo ID. In addition, customers need to fill out form C44 for couriers to clear the Amazon shipments on behalf of the customer.
- Cayman Islands: Customers in Cayman Islands must register on Cayman Customs Online System. Customers need to enter a TIN number and add DHL International (Cayman) LTD as your agent.
- Thailand: Customers in Thailand must apply for permit through TISI NSW systems. This permit is required for Toys, Electric Appliance, Safety equipment, and Vehicle spare parts. In addition, customers must obtain the LPI (license per invoice) to import medical devices.
answer: - Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared...

question: Are there any special addressing requirements for saved ids?
doc title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
chunk title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
correct_chunk:
When you place an order for a product from Amazon.com, Identity Documents (ID information) may be required for customs clearance.
Customs regulations in certain countries require you to provide ID for customs clearance. Amazon safely & securely stores the ID information in order to transmit the information to the carrier and Customs officials. This process allows your packages to clear Customs without additional delay.
When you provide your ID information for an address, the ID information links to that delivery address. We use the information provided for that shipment as well as future shipments to that address. The name on the shipping address must match the name on the provided ID information. If you're shipping to someone other than yourself, add the ID information of the recipient. To edit the ID information linked to a delivery address, go to Your Addresses.
answer:
When you place an order for a product from Amazon.com, Identity Documents (ID information) may be required for customs clearance.
Customs regulations in certain countries require you to provide ID ...

question: My tracking number does not show updates. What does that mean?
chunk title: Reasons Why Your Tracking Information Is Not Available
correct_chunk:
* Your package has not been scanned by the carrier. Issues like this can happen when shipping volume is high and packages are processed in bulk. Until this first scan, the carrier may not acknowledge receipt of the package.
* There may be a delay in updates to the tracking database.
* Some shipments, such as Standard International shipments, aren't trackable.
* Marketplace sellers don't always provide us with tracking information for their orders.
* The order is a gift. You will receive a gift receipt once the order is delivered. Until that time, the gift purchaser will receive the tracking updates.
answer: It may mean the carrier has not updated or scanned the package yet.

About packaging and packaging programs for Amazon.com.
Amazon and Global Optimism announced The Climate Pledge - a commitment to reach the Paris Agreement 10 years early. We are innovating and investing to be net zero carbon by 2040 and run on 100% renewable energy by 2030. Since 2008, sustainable packaging initiatives including Frustration-Free Packaging programs have eliminated thousands of tons of packaging materials and over 1 billion boxes by promoting easy-to-open, recyclable packaging and shipping products in their own packages without additional shipping boxes.
We listen to our customers to identify new ways to reduce waste, improve manufacturer packaging on items we sell, and innovate on the packaging we use in our fulfillment centers. We gather packaging insights via customer service, online returns, and social media to help us deliver the best possible experience while minimizing waste.

doc title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
chunk title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
correct_chunk:
Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-digit numeric OTP to your registered email address, SMS or WhatsApp on the package delivery day.
You can also find the OTP:
- By selecting Track Package beside the order in Your Orders on the delivery day.
- By checking your registered email, SMS, or WhatsApp messages.
Your OTP is valid until the end of the delivery day.
Read the OTP that you’ve received to the driver in person and not over phone or intercom to receive the package.
Note:
- If you're unable to receive the package, share the OTP with someone you choose, and they can receive the package for you in person. We don't recommend sharing the OTP with an unknown person.
- If no one can receive the package, we'll reattempt the delivery on the next working day.
- Don't add your phone number in the delivery address instructions.
- If you're not available to accept the delivery, ask the driver to reattempt the delivery when you or someone you choose will be at the delivery address.
- If you're not the package recipient or have ordered the item as a gift for someone else, forward the OTP to the recipient. Refer them to these guidelines.
answer: Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-d...

- Estimated delivery dates: if you select different delivery speeds for different items, they will ship separately.
- Shipping method chosen: some shipping options group items to minimize delivery trips.

question: What does “shipped” mean on my Amazon order?
correct_chunk:
Your delivery status is in Your Orders:
* Arriving: usually followed by a date. Your package is on its way to you
* Out for delivery: your package will be delivered today
* Delivered: your package has been delivered, and might be in your safe space
* Undeliverable: your package couldn't be delivered, and will be returned to Amazon. When we receive it, we'll automatically issue you a refund. Visit the Undeliverable packages help page.
answer: It means the package has left the fulfillment location and is moving through the delivery process.

question: how long does standard shipping take for otp delivery?
doc title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
chunk title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
correct_chunk:
Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-digit numeric OTP to your registered email address, SMS or WhatsApp on the package delivery day.
You can also find the OTP:
- By selecting Track Package beside the order in Your Orders on the delivery day.
- By checking your registered email, SMS, or WhatsApp messages.
Your OTP is valid until the end of the delivery day.
Read the OTP that you’ve received to the driver in person and not over phone or intercom to receive the package.
Note:
- If you're unable to receive the package, share the OTP with someone you choose, and they can receive the package for you in person. We don't recommend sharing the OTP with an unknown person.
- If no one can receive the package, we'll reattempt the delivery on the next working day.
- Don't add your phone number in the delivery address instructions.
- If you're not available to accept the delivery, ask the driver to reattempt the delivery when you or someone you choose will be at the delivery address.
- If you're not the package recipient or have ordered the item as a gift for someone else, forward the OTP to the recipient. Refer them to these guidelines.
answer: Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-d...

question: Can I ship an Amazon order to a hotel?
correct_chunk:
* Contact the hotel. Ask them about their policies for accepting packages. Confirm whether they need any specific information to ensure that you successfully get your item. Ask about any related fees and how early you can send the item.
* Add details to your address. You can add a new address to your Address Book. You can also add or modify instructions to existing addresses by selecting Add Delivery Instructions or Edit on the desired address. Include the following details:
  * Recipient’s full name (name on the reservation)
  * Name of the hotel
* Check your delivery times. Make sure that your delivery date during checkout matches when you are at the location.
answer: Yes, but confirm the hotel’s package policy before ordering.

question: What happens if my package is returned to sender due to usps shipping?
correct_chunk:
We ship orders to correctional facilities, but specific guidelines and restrictions apply:
- Deliveries must be sent via United States Postal Service (USPS) or another carrier authorized by the facility. Some private carriers (like UPS or FedEx) may not be allowed to deliver packages to correctional facilities.
- Packages must not contain restricted items (like tobacco, alcohol, weapons, or specific types of media).
- Make sure to contact the prison facility prior to placing your order to confirm their specific delivery rules, recipient identification formats, and package limit policies.
- If a delivery is refused by the facility, it will be returned to Amazon, and we'll automatically issue a refund for the items.

question: does amazon deliver packages to one-time password
doc title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
chunk title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
correct_chunk:
Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-digit numeric OTP to your registered email address, SMS or WhatsApp on the package delivery day.
You can also find the OTP:
- By selecting Track Package beside the order in Your Orders on the delivery day.
- By checking your registered email, SMS, or WhatsApp messages.
Your OTP is valid until the end of the delivery day.
Read the OTP that you’ve received to the driver in person and not over phone or intercom to receive the package.
Note:
- If you're unable to receive the package, share the OTP with someone you choose, and they can receive the package for you in person. We don't recommend sharing the OTP with an unknown person.
- If no one can receive the package, we'll reattempt the delivery on the next working day.
- Don't add your phone number in the delivery address instructions.
- If you're not available to accept the delivery, ask the driver to reattempt the delivery when you or someone you choose will be at the delivery address.
- If you're not the package recipient or have ordered the item as a gift for someone else, forward the OTP to the recipient. Refer them to these guidelines.

question: Does Amazon deliver packages to third-party inventory sharing?

Items 'Fulfilled by Amazon' (FBA) are offered by a third-party seller, but packed and shipped to you from an Amazon Fulfilment Center.
All Amazon standard shipping rates and policies apply to these items when shipped domestically, including free shipping on qualifying orders and premium shipping.
When we ship your order, we indicate the carrier company, shipping date and estimated delivery date on the Your Account page. You can track your package in Your Orders.
Sometimes we will send you the exact product you ordered from the inventory of another seller when it is closer to you (with both sellers' consent, of course). When we do this, we'll notify you in your shipping confirmation email and you can view information about both sellers in your order Invoice, which you can find on Your Orders.
We also handle all customer service and product returns for 'Fulfilled by Amazon' items.

question: what happens if my package is returned to sender due to thailand tisi nsw?
doc title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
chunk title: Customs Identification in Argentina, Bahamas, Cayman Islands, and Thailand
correct_chunk:
- Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared.
- The Bahamas: Customers in The Bahamas must register with the Click2Clear portal to clear shipments at Bahamas customs with a valid photo ID. In addition, customers need to fill out form C44 for couriers to clear the Amazon shipments on behalf of the customer.
- Cayman Islands: Customers in Cayman Islands must register on Cayman Customs Online System. Customers need to enter a TIN number and add DHL International (Cayman) LTD as your agent.
- Thailand: Customers in Thailand must apply for permit through TISI NSW systems. This permit is required for Toys, Electric Appliance, Safety equipment, and Vehicle spare parts. In addition, customers must obtain the LPI (license per invoice) to import medical devices.
answer: - Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared...

We ship orders to correctional facilities, but specific guidelines and restrictions apply:
- Deliveries must be sent via United States Postal Service (USPS) or another carrier authorized by the facility. Some private carriers (like UPS or FedEx) may not be allowed to deliver packages to correctional facilities.
- Packages must not contain restricted items (like tobacco, alcohol, weapons, or specific types of media).
- Make sure to contact the prison facility prior to placing your order to confirm their specific delivery rules, recipient identification formats, and package limit policies.
- If a delivery is refused by the facility, it will be returned to Amazon, and we'll automatically issue a refund for the items.

doc title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
chunk title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
correct_chunk:
Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-digit numeric OTP to your registered email address, SMS or WhatsApp on the package delivery day.
You can also find the OTP:
- By selecting Track Package beside the order in Your Orders on the delivery day.
- By checking your registered email, SMS, or WhatsApp messages.
Your OTP is valid until the end of the delivery day.
Read the OTP that you’ve received to the driver in person and not over phone or intercom to receive the package.
Note:
- If you're unable to receive the package, share the OTP with someone you choose, and they can receive the package for you in person. We don't recommend sharing the OTP with an unknown person.
- If no one can receive the package, we'll reattempt the delivery on the next working day.
- Don't add your phone number in the delivery address instructions.
- If you're not available to accept the delivery, ask the driver to reattempt the delivery when you or someone you choose will be at the delivery address.
- If you're not the package recipient or have ordered the item as a gift for someone else, forward the OTP to the recipient. Refer them to these guidelines.
answer: Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-d...

question: Why is there no tracking information for my order?
chunk title: Reasons Why Your Tracking Information Is Not Available
correct_chunk:
* Your package has not been scanned by the carrier. Issues like this can happen when shipping volume is high and packages are processed in bulk. Until this first scan, the carrier may not acknowledge receipt of the package.
* There may be a delay in updates to the tracking database.
* Some shipments, such as Standard International shipments, aren't trackable.
* Marketplace sellers don't always provide us with tracking information for their orders.
* The order is a gift. You will receive a gift receipt once the order is delivered. Until that time, the gift purchaser will receive the tracking updates.
answer: Tracking may not appear until the carrier scans the package.

question: How do customs clearance and regulations work for saved ids?
doc title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
chunk title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
correct_chunk:
When you place an order for a product from Amazon.com, Identity Documents (ID information) may be required for customs clearance.
Customs regulations in certain countries require you to provide ID for customs clearance. Amazon safely & securely stores the ID information in order to transmit the information to the carrier and Customs officials. This process allows your packages to clear Customs without additional delay.
When you provide your ID information for an address, the ID information links to that delivery address. We use the information provided for that shipment as well as future shipments to that address. The name on the shipping address must match the name on the provided ID information. If you're shipping to someone other than yourself, add the ID information of the recipient. To edit the ID information linked to a delivery address, go to Your Addresses.
answer:

question: Are there any special addressing requirements for correctional facility?
correct_chunk:
We ship orders to correctional facilities, but specific guidelines and restrictions apply:
- Deliveries must be sent via United States Postal Service (USPS) or another carrier authorized by the facility. Some private carriers (like UPS or FedEx) may not be allowed to deliver packages to correctional facilities.
- Packages must not contain restricted items (like tobacco, alcohol, weapons, or specific types of media).
- Make sure to contact the prison facility prior to placing your order to confirm their specific delivery rules, recipient identification formats, and package limit policies.
- If a delivery is refused by the facility, it will be returned to Amazon, and we'll automatically issue a refund for the items.

chunk title: About Items Shipped to Companies Not Affiliated with Amazon
correct_chunk:
Shipping items to a third-party company that isn’t affiliated with Amazon may result in complications not covered by Amazon.
Third-party companies that are not affiliated with Amazon include freight forwards, Buyer’s Clubs, third-party warehouses, and re-sellers. Amazon isn't responsible for any loss that occurs to items after the items are delivered to a third-party business and cannot issue refunds or replace these items.
For more information about freight forwarding, go to About Freight Forwarders and Hand Carry. For all other third-party companies:
* If an item arrives from Amazon with damaged packaging, please instruct the third-party company to refuse delivery. We'll issue a refund when the item is returned to Amazon.
* If an item arrives defective or damaged inside the packaging, go to Your Orders to view return options.
* If you received your package, but the item was missing from the box, go to Find a Missing Item from Your Order.
* If you have a missing package that shows as delivered, check with your third-party company. Follow the steps in Find a Missing Package that Shows as Delivered.
Amazon will not engage with a third-party company that did not make a purchase directly from Amazon.
Contact Amazon Customer Service if:
* The carrier delivered the item to the wrong address.
* You ordered a non-returnable item that was shipped in multiple boxes, and you only received a partial shipment.

To avoid delays, provide error free billing and shipping addresses.
Here are a few tips to keep in mind:
- Your billing address must match the address on your monthly credit card or bank statement.
- Leave fields blank if they don't apply to your address, for example, don't enter 'N/A,' 'Not applicable,' and so on.
- Add information in the correct fields, for example, don't enter city and state information in the Address Line 2 field. Use the city and state fields instead.
- Avoid using accent marks or non-English characters. Our system can't process these characters.
- Don't enter shipping or delivery instructions in the address fields. Amazon, our merchants, and marketplace sellers use a variety of carriers. Therefore, we can't assist with requests for specific shippers.

question: Does Amazon deliver packages to dhl agent?
doc title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
chunk title: Customs Identification in Argentina, Bahamas, Cayman Islands, and Thailand
correct_chunk:
- Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared.
- The Bahamas: Customers in The Bahamas must register with the Click2Clear portal to clear shipments at Bahamas customs with a valid photo ID. In addition, customers need to fill out form C44 for couriers to clear the Amazon shipments on behalf of the customer.
- Cayman Islands: Customers in Cayman Islands must register on Cayman Customs Online System. Customers need to enter a TIN number and add DHL International (Cayman) LTD as your agent.
- Thailand: Customers in Thailand must apply for permit through TISI NSW systems. This permit is required for Toys, Electric Appliance, Safety equipment, and Vehicle spare parts. In addition, customers must obtain the LPI (license per invoice) to import medical devices.
answer: - Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared...

doc title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
chunk title: Customs Identification in Argentina, Bahamas, Cayman Islands, and Thailand
correct_chunk:
- Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared.
- The Bahamas: Customers in The Bahamas must register with the Click2Clear portal to clear shipments at Bahamas customs with a valid photo ID. In addition, customers need to fill out form C44 for couriers to clear the Amazon shipments on behalf of the customer.
- Cayman Islands: Customers in Cayman Islands must register on Cayman Customs Online System. Customers need to enter a TIN number and add DHL International (Cayman) LTD as your agent.
- Thailand: Customers in Thailand must apply for permit through TISI NSW systems. This permit is required for Toys, Electric Appliance, Safety equipment, and Vehicle spare parts. In addition, customers must obtain the LPI (license per invoice) to import medical devices.
answer: - Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared...

question: What are the delivery terms and options for otp delivery?
doc title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
chunk title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
correct_chunk:
Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-digit numeric OTP to your registered email address, SMS or WhatsApp on the package delivery day.
You can also find the OTP:
- By selecting Track Package beside the order in Your Orders on the delivery day.
- By checking your registered email, SMS, or WhatsApp messages.
Your OTP is valid until the end of the delivery day.
Read the OTP that you’ve received to the driver in person and not over phone or intercom to receive the package.
Note:
- If you're unable to receive the package, share the OTP with someone you choose, and they can receive the package for you in person. We don't recommend sharing the OTP with an unknown person.
- If no one can receive the package, we'll reattempt the delivery on the next working day.
- Don't add your phone number in the delivery address instructions.
- If you're not available to accept the delivery, ask the driver to reattempt the delivery when you or someone you choose will be at the delivery address.
- If you're not the package recipient or have ordered the item as a gift for someone else, forward the OTP to the recipient. Refer them to these guidelines.
answer: Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-d...

question: are there any special promotions or loyalty points for address formatting?
correct_chunk:
To avoid delays, provide error free billing and shipping addresses.
Here are a few tips to keep in mind:
- Your billing address must match the address on your monthly credit card or bank statement.
- Leave fields blank if they don't apply to your address, for example, don't enter 'N/A,' 'Not applicable,' and so on.
- Add information in the correct fields, for example, don't enter city and state information in the Address Line 2 field. Use the city and state fields instead.
- Avoid using accent marks or non-English characters. Our system can't process these characters.
- Don't enter shipping or delivery instructions in the address fields. Amazon, our merchants, and marketplace sellers use a variety of carriers. Therefore, we can't assist with requests for specific shippers.

question: What happens if my package is returned to sender due to form c44?
doc title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
chunk title: Customs Identification in Argentina, Bahamas, Cayman Islands, and Thailand
correct_chunk:
- Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared.
- The Bahamas: Customers in The Bahamas must register with the Click2Clear portal to clear shipments at Bahamas customs with a valid photo ID. In addition, customers need to fill out form C44 for couriers to clear the Amazon shipments on behalf of the customer.
- Cayman Islands: Customers in Cayman Islands must register on Cayman Customs Online System. Customers need to enter a TIN number and add DHL International (Cayman) LTD as your agent.
- Thailand: Customers in Thailand must apply for permit through TISI NSW systems. This permit is required for Toys, Electric Appliance, Safety equipment, and Vehicle spare parts. In addition, customers must obtain the LPI (license per invoice) to import medical devices.
answer: - Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared...

* Marketplace sellers don't always provide us with tracking information for their orders.

chunk title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
correct_chunk:
Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-digit numeric OTP to your registered email address, SMS or WhatsApp on the package delivery day.
You can also find the OTP:
- By selecting Track Package beside the order in Your Orders on the delivery day.
- By checking your registered email, SMS, or WhatsApp messages.
Your OTP is valid until the end of the delivery day.
Read the OTP that you’ve received to the driver in person and not over phone or intercom to receive the package.
Note:
- If you're unable to receive the package, share the OTP with someone you choose, and they can receive the package for you in person. We don't recommend sharing the OTP with an unknown person.
- If no one can receive the package, we'll reattempt the delivery on the next working day.
- Don't add your phone number in the delivery address instructions.
- If you're not available to accept the delivery, ask the driver to reattempt the delivery when you or someone you choose will be at the delivery address.
- If you're not the package recipient or have ordered the item as a gift for someone else, forward the OTP to the recipient. Refer them to these guidelines.

doc title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
chunk title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
correct_chunk:
Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-digit numeric OTP to your registered email address, SMS or WhatsApp on the package delivery day.
You can also find the OTP:
- By selecting Track Package beside the order in Your Orders on the delivery day.
- By checking your registered email, SMS, or WhatsApp messages.
Your OTP is valid until the end of the delivery day.
Read the OTP that you’ve received to the driver in person and not over phone or intercom to receive the package.
Note:
- If you're unable to receive the package, share the OTP with someone you choose, and they can receive the package for you in person. We don't recommend sharing the OTP with an unknown person.
- If no one can receive the package, we'll reattempt the delivery on the next working day.
- Don't add your phone number in the delivery address instructions.
- If you're not available to accept the delivery, ask the driver to reattempt the delivery when you or someone you choose will be at the delivery address.
- If you're not the package recipient or have ordered the item as a gift for someone else, forward the OTP to the recipient. Refer them to these guidelines.
answer: Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-d...

We ship orders to correctional facilities, but specific guidelines and restrictions apply:
- Deliveries must be sent via United States Postal Service (USPS) or another carrier authorized by the facility. Some private carriers (like UPS or FedEx) may not be allowed to deliver packages to correctional facilities.
- Packages must not contain restricted items (like tobacco, alcohol, weapons, or specific types of media).
- Make sure to contact the prison facility prior to placing your order to confirm their specific delivery rules, recipient identification formats, and package limit policies.
- If a delivery is refused by the facility, it will be returned to Amazon, and we'll automatically issue a refund for the items.

question: Does Amazon deliver packages to prison delivery?

- Deliveries must be sent via United States Postal Service (USPS) or another carrier authorized by the facility. Some private carriers (like UPS or FedEx) may not be allowed to deliver packages to correctional facilities.
- Packages must not contain restricted items (like tobacco, alcohol, weapons, or specific types of media).
- Make sure to contact the prison facility prior to placing your order to confirm their specific delivery rules, recipient identification formats, and package limit policies.
- If a delivery is refused by the facility, it will be returned to Amazon, and we'll automatically issue a refund for the items.

* Marketplace sellers don't always provide us with tracking information for their orders.

answer: The carrier may not have activated or scanned the tracking number yet.

question: Who is responsible if my hotel receives the package but loses it?
correct_chunk:
* Inform the hotel. Let the front desk know that you’re expecting a package.
* Track your package. You can find tracking numbers and delivery updates in Your Orders. Visit the Tracking Your Package Help page for more details.
Amazon cannot issue refunds or replacements for packages that are delivered to a hotel but not received by the customer.
A delivery is considered successful once the package receives a delivery scan at the hotel’s front desk, concierge desk, or designated receiving area. This means Amazon will not provide a replacement or refund for any packages marked as delivered to these hotel locations but later reported missing by the guest.
For all other hotel deliveries where the package is successfully received by the customer, our standard return and refund policies still apply.
answer: After delivery is scanned at the hotel, Amazon is not responsible if the hotel loses the package.

question: Does Amazon deliver packages to form c44?
doc title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
chunk title: Customs Identification in Argentina, Bahamas, Cayman Islands, and Thailand
correct_chunk:
- Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared.
- The Bahamas: Customers in The Bahamas must register with the Click2Clear portal to clear shipments at Bahamas customs with a valid photo ID. In addition, customers need to fill out form C44 for couriers to clear the Amazon shipments on behalf of the customer.
- Cayman Islands: Customers in Cayman Islands must register on Cayman Customs Online System. Customers need to enter a TIN number and add DHL International (Cayman) LTD as your agent.
- Thailand: Customers in Thailand must apply for permit through TISI NSW systems. This permit is required for Toys, Electric Appliance, Safety equipment, and Vehicle spare parts. In addition, customers must obtain the LPI (license per invoice) to import medical devices.

- Packages must not contain restricted items (like tobacco, alcohol, weapons, or specific types of media).
- Make sure to contact the prison facility prior to placing your order to confirm their specific delivery rules, recipient identification formats, and package limit policies.
- If a delivery is refused by the facility, it will be returned to Amazon, and we'll automatically issue a refund for the items.

chunk title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
correct_chunk:
Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-digit numeric OTP to your registered email address, SMS or WhatsApp on the package delivery day.
You can also find the OTP:
- By selecting Track Package beside the order in Your Orders on the delivery day.
- By checking your registered email, SMS, or WhatsApp messages.
Your OTP is valid until the end of the delivery day.
Read the OTP that you’ve received to the driver in person and not over phone or intercom to receive the package.
Note:
- If you're unable to receive the package, share the OTP with someone you choose, and they can receive the package for you in person. We don't recommend sharing the OTP with an unknown person.
- If no one can receive the package, we'll reattempt the delivery on the next working day.
- Don't add your phone number in the delivery address instructions.
- If you're not available to accept the delivery, ask the driver to reattempt the delivery when you or someone you choose will be at the delivery address.
- If you're not the package recipient or have ordered the item as a gift for someone else, forward the OTP to the recipient. Refer them to these guidelines.

question: Does Amazon deliver packages to lpi medical license?
doc title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
chunk title: Customs Identification in Argentina, Bahamas, Cayman Islands, and Thailand
correct_chunk:
- Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared.
- The Bahamas: Customers in The Bahamas must register with the Click2Clear portal to clear shipments at Bahamas customs with a valid photo ID. In addition, customers need to fill out form C44 for couriers to clear the Amazon shipments on behalf of the customer.
- Cayman Islands: Customers in Cayman Islands must register on Cayman Customs Online System. Customers need to enter a TIN number and add DHL International (Cayman) LTD as your agent.
- Thailand: Customers in Thailand must apply for permit through TISI NSW systems. This permit is required for Toys, Electric Appliance, Safety equipment, and Vehicle spare parts. In addition, customers must obtain the LPI (license per invoice) to import medical devices.
answer: - Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared...

Items 'Fulfilled by Amazon' (FBA) are offered by a third-party seller, but packed and shipped to you from an Amazon Fulfilment Center.
All Amazon standard shipping rates and policies apply to these items when shipped domestically, including free shipping on qualifying orders and premium shipping.
When we ship your order, we indicate the carrier company, shipping date and estimated delivery date on the Your Account page. You can track your package in Your Orders.
Sometimes we will send you the exact product you ordered from the inventory of another seller when it is closer to you (with both sellers' consent, of course). When we do this, we'll notify you in your shipping confirmation email and you can view information about both sellers in your order Invoice, which you can find on Your Orders.
We also handle all customer service and product returns for 'Fulfilled by Amazon' items.

question: What are the delivery terms and options for personal id?
doc title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
chunk title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
correct_chunk:
When you place an order for a product from Amazon.com, Identity Documents (ID information) may be required for customs clearance.
Customs regulations in certain countries require you to provide ID for customs clearance. Amazon safely & securely stores the ID information in order to transmit the information to the carrier and Customs officials. This process allows your packages to clear Customs without additional delay.
When you provide your ID information for an address, the ID information links to that delivery address. We use the information provided for that shipment as well as future shipments to that address. The name on the shipping address must match the name on the provided ID information. If you're shipping to someone other than yourself, add the ID information of the recipient. To edit the ID information linked to a delivery address, go to Your Addresses.
answer:
When you place an order for a product from Amazon.com, Identity Documents (ID information) may be required for customs clearance.

question: Why is tracking information missing for my Amazon order?
chunk title: Reasons Why Your Tracking Information Is Not Available
correct_chunk:
* Your package has not been scanned by the carrier. Issues like this can happen when shipping volume is high and packages are processed in bulk. Until this first scan, the carrier may not acknowledge receipt of the package.
* There may be a delay in updates to the tracking database.
* Some shipments, such as Standard International shipments, aren't trackable.
* Marketplace sellers don't always provide us with tracking information for their orders.
* The order is a gift. You will receive a gift receipt once the order is delivered. Until that time, the gift purchaser will receive the tracking updates.
answer: Tracking may be missing because the carrier has not scanned the package, tracking database updates are delayed, the shipment is not trackable, the seller did not provide tracking, or the order is a gift.

question: What if my hotel refuses the Amazon package?
correct_chunk:
* Inform the hotel. Let the front desk know that you’re expecting a package.
* Track your package. You can find tracking numbers and delivery updates in Your Orders. Visit the Tracking Your Package Help page for more details.
Amazon cannot issue refunds or replacements for packages that are delivered to a hotel but not received by the customer.
A delivery is considered successful once the package receives a delivery scan at the hotel’s front desk, concierge desk, or designated receiving area. This means Amazon will not provide a replacement or refund for any packages marked as delivered to these hotel locations but later reported missing by the guest.
For all other hotel deliveries where the package is successfully received by the customer, our standard return and refund policies still apply.
answer: The package may become undeliverable and be returned.

question: Can I get same-day or premium delivery for correctional facility?
correct_chunk:
We ship orders to correctional facilities, but specific guidelines and restrictions apply:
- Deliveries must be sent via United States Postal Service (USPS) or another carrier authorized by the facility. Some private carriers (like UPS or FedEx) may not be allowed to deliver packages to correctional facilities.
- Packages must not contain restricted items (like tobacco, alcohol, weapons, or specific types of media).
- Make sure to contact the prison facility prior to placing your order to confirm their specific delivery rules, recipient identification formats, and package limit policies.
- If a delivery is refused by the facility, it will be returned to Amazon, and we'll automatically issue a refund for the items.

Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-digit numeric OTP to your registered email address, SMS or WhatsApp on the package delivery day.
You can also find the OTP:
- By selecting Track Package beside the order in Your Orders on the delivery day.
- By checking your registered email, SMS, or WhatsApp messages.
Your OTP is valid until the end of the delivery day.
Read the OTP that you’ve received to the driver in person and not over phone or intercom to receive the package.
Note:
- If you're unable to receive the package, share the OTP with someone you choose, and they can receive the package for you in person. We don't recommend sharing the OTP with an unknown person.
- If no one can receive the package, we'll reattempt the delivery on the next working day.
- Don't add your phone number in the delivery address instructions.
- If you're not available to accept the delivery, ask the driver to reattempt the delivery when you or someone you choose will be at the delivery address.
- If you're not the package recipient or have ordered the item as a gift for someone else, forward the OTP to the recipient. Refer them to these guidelines.

Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-digit numeric OTP to your registered email address, SMS or WhatsApp on the package delivery day.
You can also find the OTP:
- By selecting Track Package beside the order in Your Orders on the delivery day.
- By checking your registered email, SMS, or WhatsApp messages.
Your OTP is valid until the end of the delivery day.
Read the OTP that you’ve received to the driver in person and not over phone or intercom to receive the package.
Note:
- If you're unable to receive the package, share the OTP with someone you choose, and they can receive the package for you in person. We don't recommend sharing the OTP with an unknown person.
- If no one can receive the package, we'll reattempt the delivery on the next working day.
- Don't add your phone number in the delivery address instructions.
- If you're not available to accept the delivery, ask the driver to reattempt the delivery when you or someone you choose will be at the delivery address.
- If you're not the package recipient or have ordered the item as a gift for someone else, forward the OTP to the recipient. Refer them to these guidelines.
answer: Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-d...

When you purchase multiple items in a single order, they may be shipped together in one box or split into multiple packages.

- Item locations: if products are in different fulfillment centers, they will ship separately.
- Item sizes and weights: heavy or large items may require separate shipping boxes.
- Estimated delivery dates: if you select different delivery speeds for different items, they will ship separately.
- Shipping method chosen: some shipping options group items to minimize delivery trips.

question: How do I get an invoice or billing receipt for shipping address?
correct_chunk:
To avoid delays, provide error free billing and shipping addresses.
Here are a few tips to keep in mind:
- Your billing address must match the address on your monthly credit card or bank statement.
- Leave fields blank if they don't apply to your address, for example, don't enter 'N/A,' 'Not applicable,' and so on.
- Add information in the correct fields, for example, don't enter city and state information in the Address Line 2 field. Use the city and state fields instead.
- Avoid using accent marks or non-English characters. Our system can't process these characters.
- Don't enter shipping or delivery instructions in the address fields. Amazon, our merchants, and marketplace sellers use a variety of carriers. Therefore, we can't assist with requests for specific shippers.
answer:

doc title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
chunk title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
correct_chunk:
When you place an order for a product from Amazon.com, Identity Documents (ID information) may be required for customs clearance.
Customs regulations in certain countries require you to provide ID for customs clearance. Amazon safely & securely stores the ID information in order to transmit the information to the carrier and Customs officials. This process allows your packages to clear Customs without additional delay.
When you provide your ID information for an address, the ID information links to that delivery address. We use the information provided for that shipment as well as future shipments to that address. The name on the shipping address must match the name on the provided ID information. If you're shipping to someone other than yourself, add the ID information of the recipient. To edit the ID information linked to a delivery address, go to Your Addresses.
answer:

chunk title: Customs Identification in Argentina, Bahamas, Cayman Islands, and Thailand
correct_chunk:
- Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared.
- The Bahamas: Customers in The Bahamas must register with the Click2Clear portal to clear shipments at Bahamas customs with a valid photo ID. In addition, customers need to fill out form C44 for couriers to clear the Amazon shipments on behalf of the customer.
- Cayman Islands: Customers in Cayman Islands must register on Cayman Customs Online System. Customers need to enter a TIN number and add DHL International (Cayman) LTD as your agent.
- Thailand: Customers in Thailand must apply for permit through TISI NSW systems. This permit is required for Toys, Electric Appliance, Safety equipment, and Vehicle spare parts. In addition, customers must obtain the LPI (license per invoice) to import medical devices.
answer: - Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared...

All Amazon standard shipping rates and policies apply to these items when shipped domestically, including free shipping on qualifying orders and premium shipping.
When we ship your order, we indicate the carrier company, shipping date and estimated delivery date on the Your Account page. You can track your package in Your Orders.
Sometimes we will send you the exact product you ordered from the inventory of another seller when it is closer to you (with both sellers' consent, of course). When we do this, we'll notify you in your shipping confirmation email and you can view information about both sellers in your order Invoice, which you can find on Your Orders.
We also handle all customer service and product returns for 'Fulfilled by Amazon' items.

chunk title: South Korea Personal Customs Clearance Code (PCCC)
correct_chunk:
South Korea: When importing products into Korea, a Personal Customs Clearance Code (PCCC), provided by the Korea Customs Service is required for the declaration of personal items. You can create or update your PCCC on the Korea Customs Service site or obtain further information.
Note: when ordering on Amazon.com, Korean customers can use their Korean or non-Korean name. When using their Korean name, this name must be an identical match to the name used in their PCCC application (capitalization sensitive). If customers use their non-Korean name to order products on Amazon.com for shipping into Korea, the last 4 digits of the phone number in the Customs entry must match the last 4 digits of the phone number provided in their PCCC registration.

- Avoid using accent marks or non-English characters. Our system can't process these characters.

question: How do customs clearance and regulations work for otp delivery
doc title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
chunk title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
correct_chunk:
Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-digit numeric OTP to your registered email address, SMS or WhatsApp on the package delivery day.
You can also find the OTP:
- By selecting Track Package beside the order in Your Orders on the delivery day.
- By checking your registered email, SMS, or WhatsApp messages.
Your OTP is valid until the end of the delivery day.
Read the OTP that you’ve received to the driver in person and not over phone or intercom to receive the package.
Note:
- If you're unable to receive the package, share the OTP with someone you choose, and they can receive the package for you in person. We don't recommend sharing the OTP with an unknown person.
- If no one can receive the package, we'll reattempt the delivery on the next working day.
- Don't add your phone number in the delivery address instructions.
- If you're not available to accept the delivery, ask the driver to reattempt the delivery when you or someone you choose will be at the delivery address.
- If you're not the package recipient or have ordered the item as a gift for someone else, forward the OTP to the recipient. Refer them to these guidelines.
answer: Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-d...

The return is approved Return processing may take: - Up to 30 days under normal conditions - Longer in exceptional situations If additional information is required, Amazon contacts the customer with further instructions. Customers may also use Amazon support resources for: - Missing packages - Refund assistance - Product support - A-to-z Guarantee claims involving third-party sellers
answer: Refunds are issued after Amazon or the third-party seller receives and processes the returned item. Processing can take up to 30 days.

question: What should I do after ordering to a hotel?
correct_chunk:
* Inform the hotel. Let the front desk know that you’re expecting a package.
* Track your package. You can find tracking numbers and delivery updates in Your Orders. Visit the Tracking Your Package Help page for more details.
Amazon cannot issue refunds or replacements for packages that are delivered to a hotel but not received by the customer.
A delivery is considered successful once the package receives a delivery scan at the hotel’s front desk, concierge desk, or designated receiving area. This means Amazon will not provide a replacement or refund for any packages marked as delivered to these hotel locations but later reported missing by the guest.
For all other hotel deliveries where the package is successfully received by the customer, our standard return and refund policies still apply.
answer: Track the order and coordinate with the hotel for pickup.

question: can i send my amazon order to my hotel?
correct_chunk:
* Contact the hotel. Ask them about their policies for accepting packages. Confirm whether they need any specific information to ensure that you successfully get your item. Ask about any related fees and how early you can send the item.

  * Recipient’s full name (name on the reservation)
  * Name of the hotel
* Check your delivery times. Make sure that your delivery date during checkout matches when you are at the location.
answer: Yes, but confirm the hotel’s package policy before placing the order.

When you purchase multiple items in a single order, they may be shipped together in one box or split into multiple packages.
We look at several factors to determine the best shipping method:
- Item locations: if products are in different fulfillment centers, they will ship separately.
- Item sizes and weights: heavy or large items may require separate shipping boxes.
- Estimated delivery dates: if you select different delivery speeds for different items, they will ship separately.
- Shipping method chosen: some shipping options group items to minimize delivery trips.

doc title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
chunk title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
correct_chunk:
When you place an order for a product from Amazon.com, Identity Documents (ID information) may be required for customs clearance.
Customs regulations in certain countries require you to provide ID for customs clearance. Amazon safely & securely stores the ID information in order to transmit the information to the carrier and Customs officials. This process allows your packages to clear Customs without additional delay.
When you provide your ID information for an address, the ID information links to that delivery address. We use the information provided for that shipment as well as future shipments to that address. The name on the shipping address must match the name on the provided ID information. If you're shipping to someone other than yourself, add the ID information of the recipient. To edit the ID information linked to a delivery address, go to Your Addresses.

question: What happens if my package is returned to sender due to one-time password?
doc title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
chunk title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
correct_chunk:
Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-digit numeric OTP to your registered email address, SMS or WhatsApp on the package delivery day.
You can also find the OTP:
- By selecting Track Package beside the order in Your Orders on the delivery day.
- By checking your registered email, SMS, or WhatsApp messages.
Your OTP is valid until the end of the delivery day.
Read the OTP that you’ve received to the driver in person and not over phone or intercom to receive the package.
Note:
- If you're unable to receive the package, share the OTP with someone you choose, and they can receive the package for you in person. We don't recommend sharing the OTP with an unknown person.
- If no one can receive the package, we'll reattempt the delivery on the next working day.
- Don't add your phone number in the delivery address instructions.
- If you're not available to accept the delivery, ask the driver to reattempt the delivery when you or someone you choose will be at the delivery address.
- If you're not the package recipient or have ordered the item as a gift for someone else, forward the OTP to the recipient. Refer them to these guidelines.

question: Who is the carrier in charge of delivering form c44
doc title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
chunk title: Customs Identification in Argentina, Bahamas, Cayman Islands, and Thailand
correct_chunk:
- Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared.
- The Bahamas: Customers in The Bahamas must register with the Click2Clear portal to clear shipments at Bahamas customs with a valid photo ID. In addition, customers need to fill out form C44 for couriers to clear the Amazon shipments on behalf of the customer.
- Cayman Islands: Customers in Cayman Islands must register on Cayman Customs Online System. Customers need to enter a TIN number and add DHL International (Cayman) LTD as your agent.
- Thailand: Customers in Thailand must apply for permit through TISI NSW systems. This permit is required for Toys, Electric Appliance, Safety equipment, and Vehicle spare parts. In addition, customers must obtain the LPI (license per invoice) to import medical devices.
answer: - Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared...

* The order is a gift. You will receive a gift receipt once the order is delivered. Until that time, the gift purchaser will receive the tracking updates.
answer: Tracking may be unavailable due to delayed carrier scans or seller tracking issues.
